legislature_annex.title: San Juan Legislature Annex Building
legislature_annex.description: Construction of a 5,960 m² architectural landmark featuring three underground levels and five service floors. Highlights include a state-of-the-art auditorium, library, and interactive spaces, designed with a bioclimatic longitudinal courtyard.

ayres_village_gallery.title: Ayres Village Commercial Gallery
ayres_village_gallery.description: A premium two-story Strip Mall development featuring 20 commercial spaces ranging from 45 m² to 160 m². Built with a sophisticated mixed system of masonry, steel frame, and reinforced concrete for maximum durability.

ayres_village_neighborhood.title: Ayres Village Premium Residences
ayres_village_neighborhood.description: Urban development of 77 premium lots and luxury 3-bedroom residences. Complete with underground utilities, paved streets, and expansive landscaped green spaces across nearly 50,000 m².

los_molinos_neighborhood.title: Los Molinos Residential Complex
los_molinos_neighborhood.description: A large-scale housing project comprising 260 functional units across modern towers. Built with traditional excellence, featuring reinforced concrete and high-end aluminum and wood finishes.

skate_park.title: San Juan Skate Park
skate_park.description: A world-class sports facility at the San Juan Sports City. Featuring over 2,200 m² of precision-engineered reinforced concrete with professional-grade flat, curved, and inclined surfaces for high competition.

services.title: Services
services.description: More Than 35 Years Offering Concrete Solutions To Complex Requirements. Through "Personalized Technical Advice" For The Analysis, Development, Monitoring And Assistance Of Projects And Works.

engineering.title: Project Engineering
engineering.description: We develop engineering projects in their different stages, ensuring efficient, safe technical solutions in accordance with the requirements of each work.

construction.title: Construction
construction.description: We develop engineering projects in their different stages, ensuring efficient, safe technical solutions in accordance with the requirements of each work.

real-estate.title: Real Estate Developments
real-estate.description: We have focused this business unit on the "Projection, Execution And Commercialization Of Gated Communities" of high construction quality, standing out for its urban qualities, strategic location and rapid consolidation.

architecture.title: Architecture
architecture.description: We execute "Civil And Architectural Works" for the public and private sector, spanning from planning and construction to the integral coordination of the works, guaranteeing construction quality, compliance with deadlines and site safety.

mining.title: Mining
mining.description: We have a "Specialized Technical Team" to develop and execute projects in mining locations, incorporating cutting-edge technology at the service of construction. We provide services to mining companies in "Massive Earthworks", "Civil Works" and associated works.

equipment.title: Heavy Equipment Supply
equipment.description: We have our "Own Fleet Of Equipment" that allows us to offer heavy equipment supply and operation services in all stages, sectors and facilities of mining projects, with "Highly Trained And Qualified Personnel".

centauri_adium.title: Centauri Adium Project
centauri_adium.description: Construction of Building 2 (approx. 4,370 m²) for solid production, offices, and dining area. Includes Power Plant 5 and service area, essential infrastructure for the complex's operational capacity.

los_molinos.title: Los Molinos Residential Complex
los_molinos.description: A high-scale residential development with 260 functional units. Built with traditional methods, featuring reinforced concrete, high-end aluminum/wood finishes, and quality ceramic tile work.

punta_negra.title: Punta Negra Dam Water Treatment Plant
punta_negra.description: Construction of a water treatment plant at Punta Negra Dam. Features specialized intake systems, 21 high-efficiency filters, and storage cisterns with a 20,000 m³ capacity.

linea_132.title: 132 kV Power Line
linea_132.description: Construction of a 132 kV power line and expansion of transformer stations in San Juan. Enhances regional energy infrastructure and capacity for renewable energy transmission.

los_azules.title: Los Azules
los_azules.description: Road opening and maintenance within the project area, ensuring access and internal circulation for equipment and machinery. Fourth working season.

veladero.title: Veladero
veladero.description: Operational works in process and mining sectors, along with opening and maintenance of access roads, supporting the project's operational needs.

hualilan.title: Hualilan
hualilan.description: Internal mineral transport works, along with PIT opening and infrastructure development for mine construction.

history.title: History
history.description: SIGMA S.A. was founded in 1988 with the conviction of developing high-quality construction systems and modalities in the province of San Juan and throughout the country. Since its inception, the company has committed to innovation, incorporating cutting-edge technologies and work techniques, optimizing resources, and empowering a highly trained professional team, with a focus on continuous improvement, safety, and efficiency in every project.

mission.title: Mission
mission.description: To provide engineering and architecture services with high-quality standards, optimizing time and resources, guaranteeing site safety, and maximizing our clients' profitability. We seek to execute projects in a sustainable, innovative, and efficient manner, solidifying ourselves as a reference in the construction sector in San Juan and Argentina.

vision.title: Vision
vision.description: To position ourselves as the best and most innovative company in the construction and engineering field, remaining at the forefront of new technologies based on the specialization and training of our staff, while respecting environmental conservation standards.

values.title: Values
values.description: At SIGMA S.A., we act with ethics, honesty, and transparency in all our processes. We promote teamwork and continuous improvement, caring for the health and safety of our collaborators, respecting the environment, and fostering sustainable practices. We assume a strong commitment to the communities where we operate, building bonds based on trust and social responsibility.

policy.title: Quality, Safety And Environment Policy.
policy.description: In "SIGMA S.A." we assume the commitment of satisfying the requirements and expectations of our clients and other interested parties, providing services in an efficient, responsible and sustainable manner. For this, we implement and maintain an Integrated Management System, aligned with the standards "ISO 9001:2015", "ISO 14001:2015" and "ISO 45001:2018", oriented to quality, safety and occupational health, and the protection of the environment to Integrated Management.
